userId.description: User's unique identifier assigned by the tenant.

emailListIds.description: List of static list IDs the user is a member of (email-based projects).

knownLitigatorFilter.description: Known litigator confidence level (LT1, LT2, or LT3).

profileUpdatedAt.description: Date and time when the profile was last updated.

receivedSMSDisclaimer.description: Whether the user has received an SMS with opt-out instructions.

signupDate.description: Date and time when the user profile was created.

signupSource.description: How the contact was created in Iterable (e.g. API, IMPORT).

subscribedMessageTypeIds.description: List of opt-in message type IDs the user has subscribed to.

unsubscribedChannelIds.description: List of channel IDs the user has unsubscribed from.

unsubscribedMessageTypeIds.description: List of opt-out message type IDs the user has unsubscribed from.

userListIds.description: List of static list IDs the user is a member of (userId/hybrid projects).

phoneNumber.description: User's phone number used for SMS.

profile.description: Profile data used for message personalization.

itblInternal.emailDomain.description: Domain of the user's email address (managed by Iterable).

itblInternal.phoneCountry.description: ISO-3166 country code for the user's phone number.

itblInternal.phoneType.description: Type of phone number (MOBILE, FIXED_LINE, VOIP, etc.).

itblInternal.documentCreatedAt.description: Timestamp when the user document was created internally.

itblInternal.documentUpdatedAt.description: Timestamp when the user document was last updated internally.

itblInternal.isUnknownUser.description: Whether the user is flagged as unknown by Iterable.

itblDS.brandAffinityLabel.description: Contact's engagement level as determined by Brand Affinity.

itblDS.predictiveGoals.description: User conversion scores for Predictive Goals.

data.description: Custom data fields specific to the tenant. Contains all non-standard user profile fields.
